title: New Simple Mods
description: A modpack made up of mods that are easy to understand and ideal for any player.
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Simple_Mods/BH_NSM_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/new-simple-mods) version.** ## Ready to enjoy a modpack that's easy for everyone? The objective of New Simple Mods is to allow the most novice players to expand the game possibilities by using hundreds of mods, but mods that are very easy to understand and that will not require a study to know what each element does. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Simple_Mods/BH_NSM_summary.webp) In summary, this modpack is ideal for all those players who love the "vanilla" Minecraft experience, but who want to change their worlds a bit by adding a few mods. Of course, these mods are simple, such as decorative mods or biome mods, and they do not need any type of study behind. There are many modpacks that incorporate dozens of magic and technology mods that require a lot of effort to understand, which makes the game boring and too heavy, which is exactly what we wanted to avoid with this modpack. 🌹 Improve your gameplay quality, with unique mods like Advancement Plaques, Better Advancements, Falling Leaves, Ambient Environment or AmbientSounds. 🌎 Discover new and wonderful landscapes, thanks to the famous Biomes O' Plenty! 🦍 More than a hundred new animals, and as the main mod, the famous and beloved by the whole community, Alex's Mobs! 🏘️ Structures that perfectly combine with the vanilla experience, thanks to Additional Structures, Awesome Dungeons, Medieval Buildings, or YUNG's own mods! 🦖 Be very careful with the new enemies, which will not leave you indifferent. Enjoy Hunter'sReturn or the classic mutants of Mutant Monsters. 🧱 Decorate your constructions with all the Macaw's mods or the famous MrCrayfish's Furniture. ✔️ Of course, you will be able to make use of shaders with the addition of Oculus and other mods! 🙏 An ideal modpack for multiplayer games! Mods like PlayerRevive, Simple Voice Chat or YDM's Weapon Master will brighten up your game! ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Simple_Mods/BH_NSM_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 4GB or 4096 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 7GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zc03QhUT/images/8d984026925dcef2a448d4e2e0deaa297eca964b.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zc03QhUT/images/fb50647f84a98a269345c32ab2e353d24163088e.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
